rag_rules: Repair only the specific port reference errors reported by validator; do not alter component structure or introduce new bindings.
generic_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers by ensuring they map to visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex scope.
Preserve all non-diagnosed architecture elements — repairs must be minimal and targeted.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and temporal operators (pre) with properly typed expressions.
Guard pre() expressions with an initialized state if historical comparison is needed.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to resolve AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables — they are not in scope.
Do not inject package-qualified identifiers or data types not explicitly declared in the model or its dependencies.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
